controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept at the counters and made available to the customers
controls.control_description: Considering that accepting coins packed in sachets of 100 pieces each would be more convenient for the cashiers as well as the customers, such sachets shall be kept at the counters and made available to the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept at the counters and made available to the customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted by weighment
controls.control_description: Coins, in the denominations of ₹1 and ₹2 shall be accepted by weighment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted by weighment

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide the above facilities to members of public without any discrimination on all working days
controls.control_description: (b) All branches shall provide the above facilities to members of public without any discrimination on all working days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide the above facilities to members of public without any discrimination on all working days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available with the respective banks
controls.control_description: The names and addresses of such bank branches shall be available with the respective banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available with the respective banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given wide publicity for information of the public at large
controls.control_description: (c) The availability of the above-mentioned facilities at the bank branches shall be given wide publicity for information of the public at large.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given wide publicity for information of the public at large

controls.control_objective: To ensure refuse to accept small denomination notes and / or coins tendered at their counters
controls.control_description: (d) None of the bank branches shall refuse to accept small denomination notes and / or coins tendered at their counters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refuse to accept small denomination notes and / or coins tendered at their counters

controls.control_objective: To ensure the rbi may, with prior sanction of the central government, prescribe the circumstances in, and the conditions and limitations subject to which, the v
controls.control_description: However, with a view to mitigating hardship to the public in genuine cases, it has been provided that the RBI may, with prior sanction of the Central Government, prescribe the circumstances in, and the conditions and limitations subject to which, the value of such currency notes or banknotes may be refunded as a matter of grace.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the rbi may, with prior sanction of the central government, prescribe the circumstances in, and the conditions and limitations subject to which, the v

controls.control_objective: To ensure exchange mutilated and defective notes at their option
controls.control_description: 1 Small Finance Banks (up to two years from the commencement of their banking business) and Payment Banks may exchange mutilated and defective notes at their option.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exchange mutilated and defective notes at their option

controls.control_objective: To ensure a note which has become dirty due to normal wear and tear and also includes a two piece note pasted together wherein both the pieces presented belong
controls.control_description: A 'soiled note' means a note which has become dirty due to normal wear and tear and also includes a two piece note pasted together wherein both the pieces presented belong to the same note and form the entire note with no essential feature missing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a note which has become dirty due to normal wear and tear and also includes a two piece note pasted together wherein both the pieces presented belong

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted over bank counters in payment of government dues and for credit to accounts of the public maintained with banks
controls.control_description: These notes shall be accepted over bank counters in payment of Government dues and for credit to accounts of the public maintained with banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted over bank counters in payment of government dues and for credit to accounts of the public maintained with banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued to the public as re- issuable notes, and such notes shall be deposited in currency chests for onward transmission to rbi offices as soiled n
controls.control_description: However, in no case, these notes shall be issued to the public as re- issuable notes, and such notes shall be deposited in currency chests for onward transmission to RBI offices as soiled note remittances for further processing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued to the public as re- issuable notes, and such notes shall be deposited in currency chests for onward transmission to rbi offices as soiled n

controls.control_objective: To ensure be presented at any of the bank branches
controls.control_description: Mutilated notes shall be presented at any of the bank branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be presented at any of the bank branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted, exchanged and adjudicated in accordance with nrr, 2009
controls.control_description: The notes so presented shall be accepted, exchanged and adjudicated in accordance with NRR, 2009.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted, exchanged and adjudicated in accordance with nrr, 2009

controls.control_objective: To ensure take steps to see that the exchange facilities are not cornered by private money changers or professional dealers of defective notes
controls.control_description: The branches shall take steps to see that the exchange facilities are not cornered by private money changers or professional dealers of defective notes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take steps to see that the exchange facilities are not cornered by private money changers or professional dealers of defective notes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted by the bank branches for exchange
controls.control_description:
Extremely Brittle, Burnt, Charred, Stuck-Up Notes
Notes which have turned extremely brittle or are badly burnt, charred or inseparably stuck up together and, therefore, cannot withstand normal handling, shall not be accepted by the bank branches for exchange.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted by the bank branches for exchange

controls.control_objective: To ensure be advised to tender these notes to the issue office of reserve bank of india concerned where they will be adjudicated under a special procedure
controls.control_description: Instead, the holders shall be advised to tender these notes to the Issue Office of Reserve Bank of India concerned where they will be adjudicated under a Special Procedure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be advised to tender these notes to the issue office of reserve bank of india concerned where they will be adjudicated under a special procedure

controls.control_objective: To ensure exchange them over the counter, free of charge
controls.control_description: 6.1.1 Notes presented in small number: Where the number of notes presented by a person is up to 20 pieces with a maximum value of ₹5,000 per day, banks shall exchange them over the counter, free of charge.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exchange them over the counter, free of charge

controls.control_objective: To ensure accept them against receipt, for value to be credited later
controls.control_description: 6.1.2 Notes presented in bulk: Where the number of notes presented by a person exceeds 20 pieces or ₹5,000 in value per day, banks shall accept them against receipt, for value to be credited later.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accept them against receipt, for value to be credited later

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy service charges as permitted in master circular on customer service in banks (dbr
controls.control_description:
Banks shall levy service charges as permitted in Master Circular on Customer Service in
Banks (DBR.No.Leg.BC.21/09.07.006/2015-16 dated July 1, 2015).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy service charges as permitted in master circular on customer service in banks (dbr

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to follow the procedure as laid down in part iii of nrr, 2009 (www
controls.control_description: 6.2.1 While designated branches shall continue to follow the procedure as laid down in Part III of NRR, 2009 (www.rbi.org.in→Publications→Occassional) for exchanging mutilated and imperfect notes and issue receipt for the notes presented for adjudication, non-chest branches are required to follow the procedure mentioned in the following paragraphs 6.2.2 and 6.2.3 of this Master Direction for notes presented in small numbers and in bulk respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to follow the procedure as laid down in part iii of nrr, 2009 (www

controls.control_objective: To ensure normally adjudicate the notes as per the procedure laid down in part iii of nrr, 2009 and pay the exchange value over the counter
controls.control_description: 6.2.2 Notes presented in small number: Where the number of notes presented by a person is up to 5 pieces, non-chest branches shall normally adjudicate the notes as per the procedure laid down in Part III of NRR, 2009 and pay the exchange value over the counter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to normally adjudicate the notes as per the procedure laid down in part iii of nrr, 2009 and pay the exchange value over the counter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be received against a receipt and sent to the linked currency chest branch for adjudication
controls.control_description: If the non-chest branches are not able to adjudicate the mutilated notes, the notes shall be received against a receipt and sent to the linked currency chest branch for adjudication.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be received against a receipt and sent to the linked currency chest branch for adjudication

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 30 days
controls.control_description: The probable date of payment shall be informed to the tenderers on the receipt itself and the same shall not exceed 30 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 30 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained from the tenderers for crediting the exchange value by electronic means
controls.control_description: Bank account details shall be obtained from the tenderers for crediting the exchange value by electronic means.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained from the tenderers for crediting the exchange value by electronic means

controls.control_objective: To ensure be advised to send such notes to nearby currency chest branch by insured post giving his / her bank account details (a/c no, branch name
controls.control_description: 6.2.3 Notes presented in bulk: Where the number of notes presented by a person is more than 5 pieces but not exceeding ₹5,000 in value, the tenderer shall be advised to send such notes to nearby currency chest branch by insured post giving his / her bank account details (a/c no, branch name, IFSC, etc.) or get them exchanged thereat in person.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be advised to send such notes to nearby currency chest branch by insured post giving his / her bank account details (a/c no, branch name

controls.control_objective: To ensure be advised to approach nearby currency chest branch
controls.control_description: All other persons tendering mutilated notes whose value exceeds ₹5,000 shall be advised to approach nearby currency chest branch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be advised to approach nearby currency chest branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure credit the exchange value to the account of sender by electronic means within 30 days of receipt of notes
controls.control_description: Currency chest branches receiving mutilated notes through insured post shall credit the exchange value to the account of sender by electronic means within 30 days of receipt of notes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to credit the exchange value to the account of sender by electronic means within 30 days of receipt of notes

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the rbi ombudsman under 'the reserve bank - integrated ombudsman scheme, 2021'
controls.control_description: 6.3 Grievance Redressal: Tenderers aggrieved with the service provided by the banks and a related grievance not resolved to the satisfaction of the customers, or not replied to within a period of 30 days by the bank may approach the RBI Ombudsman under 'The Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the rbi ombudsman under 'the reserve bank - integrated ombudsman scheme, 2021'

controls.control_objective: To ensure act as 'prescribed officer' in each branch to adjudicate the notes received at the branch for exchange in accordance with nrr, 2009
controls.control_description: the Branch Manager and every Officer-in-charge of the Accounts or Cash Wing of the Branch shall act as 'Prescribed Officer' in each branch to adjudicate the notes received at the branch for exchange in accordance with NRR, 2009.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act as 'prescribed officer' in each branch to adjudicate the notes received at the branch for exchange in accordance with nrr, 2009

controls.control_objective: To ensure to record his order by subscribing his initials to the dated 'pay'/ 'paid'/ 'reject' stamp
controls.control_description: After adjudicating mutilated notes, the Prescribed Officer is required to record his order by subscribing his initials to the dated 'PAY'/ 'PAID'/ 'REJECT' stamp.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to record his order by subscribing his initials to the dated 'pay'/ 'paid'/ 'reject' stamp

controls.control_objective: To ensure also carry the name of the bank and branch concerned and such stamps held under the custody of the 'prescribed officer' to avoid misuse
controls.control_description: The 'PAY' /'PAID' & 'REJECT' stamps shall also carry the name of the bank and branch concerned and such stamps held under the custody of the 'Prescribed Officer' to avoid misuse.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also carry the name of the bank and branch concerned and such stamps held under the custody of the 'prescribed officer' to avoid misuse

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rejected under rule 6(2) of nrr, 2009 and the tenderer shall be advised that the value of such note/s cannot be paid since the same has already bee
controls.control_description:
(b) Mutilated / defective notes bearing 'PAY'/'PAID' (or 'REJECT') stamp of any RBI Issue Office or any bank branch, if presented for payment again at any of the bank branches shall be rejected under Rule 6(2) of NRR, 2009 and the tenderer shall be advised that the value of such note/s cannot be paid since the same has already been paid as is evident from the PAY/ PAID stamps
affixed on it/ them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rejected under rule 6(2) of nrr, 2009 and the tenderer shall be advised that the value of such note/s cannot be paid since the same has already bee

controls.control_objective: To ensure caution their customers not to accept such notes from any bank or anybody else
controls.control_description: The branches shall caution their customers not to accept such notes from any bank or anybody else.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to caution their customers not to accept such notes from any bank or anybody else

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reissued for circulation and be remitted to currency chest for onward remittance to rbi offices
controls.control_description: (b) Such notes received from members of public shall not be reissued for circulation and be remitted to currency chest for onward remittance to RBI offices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reissued for circulation and be remitted to currency chest for onward remittance to rbi offices

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be rejected under rule 6(3) (ii) of nrr, 2009
controls.control_description: Similarly, notes which are disfigured may also be rejected under Rule 6(3) (ii) of NRR, 2009.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be rejected under rule 6(3) (ii) of nrr, 2009

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rejected under rule 6(3) (ii) of the nrr, 2009
controls.control_description:
Deliberately Cut Notes
The notes which are found to be deliberately cut, torn, altered or tampered with, if presented for payment of exchange value shall be rejected under Rule 6(3) (ii) of the NRR, 2009.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rejected under rule 6(3) (ii) of the nrr, 2009

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the dgm/ gm, issue department, reserve bank of india under whose jurisdiction the branch falls
controls.control_description: The details of such instances together with the name of the tenderer, the number of notes tendered and their denominations, shall be reported to the DGM/ GM, Issue Department, Reserve Bank of India under whose jurisdiction the branch falls.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the dgm/ gm, issue department, reserve bank of india under whose jurisdiction the branch falls

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported to local police in case a large number of such notes are tendered
controls.control_description: The matter shall also be reported to local police in case a large number of such notes are tendered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported to local police in case a large number of such notes are tendered

controls.control_objective: To ensure to display at their branch premises, at a prominent place, a board indicating the availability of note and coin exchange facility with the legend, "so
controls.control_description:
Display of Notice Board
All bank branches are required to display at their branch premises, at a prominent place, a board indicating the availability of note and coin exchange facility with the legend, "SOILED/ MUTILATED NOTES AND COINS ARE ACCEPTED AND EXCHANGED HERE" for information of general public.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to display at their branch premises, at a prominent place, a board indicating the availability of note and coin exchange facility with the legend, "so

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all their branches provide facility for exchange of notes and coins not only to their customers but also others
controls.control_description: Banks shall ensure that all their branches provide facility for exchange of notes and coins not only to their customers but also others.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all their branches provide facility for exchange of notes and coins not only to their customers but also others

controls.control_objective: To ensure be packed separately with separate invoice and sent along with the full value paid notes as part of soiled remittance or sent by registered and insure
controls.control_description:
The half value paid notes and rejected notes, which are held by the chest
branches in their cash balance, shall be packed separately with separate invoice and sent along with the full value paid notes as part of soiled remittance or sent by registered and insured post as and when required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be packed separately with separate invoice and sent along with the full value paid notes as part of soiled remittance or sent by registered and insure

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit to our rbi issue offices a monthly statement showing the number of notes adjudicated during the month
controls.control_description: All chest branches are required to submit to our RBI Issue Offices a monthly statement showing the number of notes adjudicated during the month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit to our rbi issue offices a monthly statement showing the number of notes adjudicated during the month

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay surprise visits to the branches and report the position of compliance in this regard to the head office which will review such reports and take prompt remedial action
controls.control_description: (a) The Regional Managers / Zonal Managers of the banks shall pay surprise visits to the branches and report the position of compliance in this regard to the Head Office which will review such reports and take prompt remedial action, wherever necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to pay surprise visits to the branches and report the position of compliance in this regard to the head office which will review such reports and take prompt remedial action

controls.control_objective: To ensure be viewed as violation of instructions issued by the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description: (b) Any non-compliance in this regard shall be viewed as violation of instructions issued by the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be viewed as violation of instructions issued by the reserve bank of india
